app.name: Vorsorge Wizard
app.tagline: Your advance directive documents – simple, secure, free
app.disclaimer: Important Notice: Vorsorge Wizard does not constitute legal advice. The generated documents are intended as guidance and do not replace individual legal or medical consultation.

landing.headline: Your Advance Directive Documents
landing.subline: Create them easily, securely, and for free
landing.privacyNote: Your data stays on your device until you create an account
landing.benefit2Desc: Your data stays on your device until you create an account
landing.benefit3Desc: Documents structured according to German law
landing.doc1Desc: Specifies your medical treatment preferences if you can no longer communicate.
landing.doc2Desc: Authorises a trusted person to make decisions on your behalf.
landing.doc3Desc: Guides courts in selecting a legal guardian if one becomes necessary.

intro.title: What to expect
intro.desc: In about 10–15 minutes, we'll guide you through all the necessary questions to create three important advance directive documents.
intro.privacyDesc: Your answers stay on your device until you create an account.

step1.title: Personal Information
step1.desc: This information will appear on all your documents.

step2.title: Trusted Person
step2.desc: This person will be named in your Power of Attorney and Guardianship Directive.
step2.whyTooltip: This person receives authority to make medical and legal decisions on your behalf when you can no longer do so yourself.
step2.substituteDesc: In case the primary trusted person is unavailable.

step3.title: Medical Treatment Preferences
step3.desc: Specify which medical measures you wish to accept or refuse.
step3.cprQuestion: Should resuscitation be attempted if your heart stops beating?
step3.cprTooltip: CPR includes chest compressions and artificial ventilation. It can save lives but sometimes causes injuries.
step3.ventilationQuestion: Should mechanical ventilation be used if you can no longer breathe on your own?
step3.ventilationTooltip: A ventilator takes over breathing via a tube in the airway.
step3.nutritionQuestion: Should artificial nutrition (e.g. feeding tube) be used?
step3.nutritionTooltip: A feeding tube (PEG) delivers liquid nutrition directly to the stomach when normal eating is not possible.
step3.dialysisQuestion: Should dialysis be used if your kidneys fail?
step3.dialysisTooltip: Dialysis filters waste from the blood, taking over kidney function. It requires several hours of treatment per week.
step3.antibioticsQuestion: Should antibiotics be used if an infection threatens your life?
step3.antibioticsTooltip: Antibiotics fight bacterial infections and can be lifesaving.
step3.painQuestion: How do you prioritise pain relief?
step3.painTooltip: Strong pain medication (e.g. morphine) may in some cases shorten life. This question asks how you want to balance this trade-off.

step4.title: Situational Preferences
step4.desc: Specify your wishes for specific clinical situations.
step4.terminalDesc: If I am suffering from an incurable illness and death is expected in the foreseeable future...

terminalOptions.dieAtHome: I wish to die in my familiar surroundings
terminalOptions.palliativeCare: I wish to receive palliative / hospice care
terminalOptions.painOverLife: Pain relief takes priority over life preservation

step4.unconsciousDesc: If I am permanently unconscious with no prospect of recovery...
step4.dementiaDesc: If I am suffering from severe dementia and can no longer make my own decisions...

dementiaOptions.palliativeFocus: Comfort and palliative measures take priority

step5.title: Personal Values & Wishes
step5.desc: This optional section gives your documents a personal touch.
step5.personalStatementPlaceholder: What is most important to you in life? What values guide you?
step5.personalStatementHint: This text will appear in your living will.
step5.religiousWishesPlaceholder: Do you have any religious wishes regarding your treatment or funeral?
step5.organDonationYes: Yes, I am an organ donor
step5.organDonationNo: No, I am not an organ donor

step6.title: Summary & Review
step6.legalNote: Please review all information carefully. After downloading, you must sign and date the documents by hand.

step7.title: Create Account
step7.desc: Create an account to save and download your documents.
step7.acceptPrivacy: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy.
step7.acceptTerms: I accept the Terms of Service.
step7.emailReminders: I would like to receive annual email reminders to review my documents.

step8.title: Download Documents
step8.desc: Your documents are ready. Download, print, and sign them by hand.
step8.nextStep3: Give a copy to your trusted person
step8.nextStep4: Store the original in a safe place
step8.nextStep5: Inform your GP about the existence of the documents

documents.vorsorgevollmachtDesc: Authorises a person to act on your behalf.

auth.logoutSuccess: You have been successfully logged out.

dashboard.title: My Documents
dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this document package? This action cannot be undone.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.invalidPostalCode: Please enter a valid postal code (5 digits).
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters long.
errors.serverError: An error occurred. Please try again later.

footer.disclaimer: Vorsorge Wizard does not constitute legal advice.
